title: Dynamic Routing Between Capsules
description: Geoffrey Hinton and Sara Sabour introduced Capsule Networks, a new architecture that preserves spatial hierarchies between features. Unlike CNNs, capsules output vectors representing instantiation parameters (pose, orientation, etc.) and use dynamic routing. The paper achieved state-of-the-art on MNIST with far fewer parameters and showed superior performance on overlapping digits.
highlights: Superior to CNNs on overlapping objects
